creator: daniel.tihanyi@tetragir.com
text:
Created attachment 223021
Rundeck3 update to 3.3.10

Update for Rundeck to 3.3.10

Release highlights:
- Enterprise updates:
  - Fix: Dynamic properties for DataDog Incidents
  - Fix: Health Checks show inappropriate last refresh date
  - New/Updated ServiceNow Plugin - Options Plugin fixed - Fixes for Incident View with linked table reference fields.
- Core product update:
  - Fix 1369: duplicate secure option doesn't work correctly

https://docs.rundeck.com/docs/history/3_3_x/version-3.3.10.html
